nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Skip, I need to talk to you. I've been riding the bench for three weeks. What's going on?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I'll be straight with you — {{npcPlayerName}} has been outperforming you. I'm going with the hot hand.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Your time is coming. I've got plans for you in the lineup this week. Stay ready.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: You want to play? Earn it. Your numbers aren't where they need to be.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Fine. But if I'm not in the lineup by Friday, my agent's going to have a conversation with you.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: ...Fair enough. I'll put in the work. But I need a chance to show what I can do.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Hey kid, you got a minute? I've been watching you in the cage. I think I can help with your approach.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Absolutely. I've been wanting to pick your brain about hitting with two strikes.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: Thanks, but I've been working with the hitting coach on something specific. Maybe next time.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: Two-strike approach is all about shortening up. Choke up half an inch, widen your stance. Protect the plate. I'll show you what I mean.

nodes.speaker: npc
nodes.text: You traded {{npcPlayerName}}? He was my best friend on this team. How could you do that?

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: It's a business decision. The return we got makes this team better. I know it's hard.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: I know this is tough. He meant a lot to this clubhouse. But I promise — what we got back will help us win.

nodes.speaker: player
nodes.text: That's part of baseball. You'll make new friends.
